title: Ryanair invests £40m in Prestwick airport maintenance expansion

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Ryanair invests £40m in Prestwick airport maintenance expansion. The expansion project will make Prestwick Airport Ryanair's largest European maintenance base.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Ryanair invests £40m in Prestwick airport maintenance expansion
